task_desc: Left sidebar -- Activity Feed. Add a collapsible left sidebar to the UI with a real-time scrolling activity feed. Feed shows Claude's actions and notable events: "Placed food at (320, 280) -- hunger was 0.82", "Set light to Dim -- fatigue rising", "WARNING: fly fear spiked to 0.7". Each entry: timestamp, action icon, description, reasoning. Color-coded: green = feeding, blue = comfort, yellow = warning, red = incident. Data pulled from actions/incidents tables via WebSocket channel from server. Auto-scrolls, click to expand reasoning. Files: new `js/caretaker-sidebar.js`, `css/main.css` (sidebar layout), `index.html` (sidebar HTML), `server/caretaker.js` (broadcast actions/incidents to sidebar).
